title: quickiefabric
description: a small mod to speed up minecraft playing for people like me that don't have so much time
body:
This mod has been made to speed up jobs that you do in minecraft all the time, such as block harvesting, transporting content from one chest to another and such. For that reason, I have created tools that speed up block breaking (including their neighbours), building a field of 9x9 soils and save areas where you don't have to fight monsters in the overworld. Besides that, I have created an item sucker that sucks items around and a lava horder that sucks lava (like a sponge). For quicker sorting and transporting of chest content, I have created blocks that transport complete stacks of items at once (including filter options).

This project is archived because of its successor **quickly** which you can find here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/quickly](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickly)
